name: @forgeax/app-learn-render-2-lighting-6-multiple-lights
description: learn-render LearnOpenGL section 2.6 multiple lights — combined 1 directional + 4 point + 1 spot (flashlight) scene with diffuse+specular textured cubes and first-person camera.

bench.reason: pixel-parity bench drives parity-forgeax vs parity-threejs; learn-render entries land as bench:pixel-parity placeholders only

gate.reason: no smoke test yet for multiple-lights demo
